name: exo
description: Use Exo project state from Codex through the CLI-shaped exo-run MCP tool.

interface.shortDescription: Use the Exo project loop from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Registers an MCP server that launches the durable `exo-mcp` proxy and adds guidance for using the single CLI-shaped `exo-run` tool.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Exo to inspect project state and keep the active phase and task plan current.
